channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Dow tumbles 600 points as Brent crude tops $100, Alphabet and Tesla drop: Live updates
item.description: U.S. equities fell on Thursday, as oil prices surged amid escalating conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: Trump says Saudi nuclear deal contingent on relations with Israel, does not include enrichment
item.description: The civilian nuclear cooperation agreement, signed Wednesday, will be sent to Congress for review, the Department of Energy said.

item.title: House lawmakers grill former JPMorgan executive Jes Staley over Epstein ties
item.description: House oversight Chair James Comer said Jes Staley defended Jeffrey Epstein and encouraged JPMorgan to retain him despite internal red flags.

item.title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
item.description: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports.

item.title: Google Cloud CEO Kurian says customers are spending 50% more as segment blows away expectations
item.description: Google Cloud CEO Thomas Kurian told CNBC on Thursday that the company's existing customers are spending "roughly 50% more" than they've already committed.

item.title: Albertsons stock plunges as it says weaker grocery spending will cut into sales and earnings
item.description: Shares of Albertsons sank Thursday after the grocer reported softness in its core business and lowered its full-year outlook as a result.

item.title: Risk/reward is favorable to buy Kimberly-Clark at current prices, Jay Woods says
item.description: This week we want a stock with strong fundamentals, safe dividend and that's technically rebounding, giving a great opportunity over a longer time horizon.

item.title: American Airlines stock tumbles 8% as fuel spike further postpones turnaround
item.description: American Airlines further cut its 2026 earnings outlook, citing higher fuel costs.

item.title: Brent crude tops $100 a barrel. How the next stop could be $120
item.description: Goldman Sachs warns on oil prices and so called tank bottoms ( and loves a new natural gas-related name).

item.title: Cyclospora outbreak tests RFK Jr.'s promise to overhaul food system, rebuild trust in CDC
item.description: Cyclospora presents a test for HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s promise to overhaul the food system and restore confidence in the agencies overseeing it.

item.title: A tax break for preserving land has drawn IRS scrutiny. Here’s when it still makes sense
item.description: For wealthy landowners, conservation easements can still make sense if you avoid these IRS red flags.

item.title: AARP to Congress: 'We strongly object to fast-tracking Social Security changes'
item.description: New legislation aims to break the stalemate on overhauling Social Security. AARP, which advocates on senior issues, says it opposes them.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will hold Iran responsible for Houthi attacks after oil tankers targeted in Red Sea
item.description: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.

item.title: 10-year Treasury yield rises to highest since January 2025 as surging oil rekindles inflation fear
item.description: U.S. Treasury yields climbed on Wednesday, following oil prices higher, as traders also reacted to a slump in weekly claims for unemployment insurance.

item.title: Tech reporter Joanna Stern asked AI to do 'almost everything' for a year—the No. 1 tool she'll keep using
item.description: "I Am Not a Robot" author Joanna Stern integrated dozens of AI applications into her life over the course of a year. She says this one has stuck with her.

item.title: Traders see September rate hike as European Central Bank mulls energy price spike
item.description: ECB president Christine Lagarde said the bank anticipates inflation to remain "well above target" until the first half of 2027.

item.title: Eli Lilly says it will file for approval of next-generation obesity drug in 2027 as it clears two more trials
item.description: There are now positive results from five late-stage trials on retatrutide, which Lilly is positioning as the next pillar of its obesity portfolio.

item.title: Tesla gets price target cuts from analysts on earnings miss. What they're saying
item.description: Tesla underwhelmed Wall Street with its latest financial results, leading some analysts to lower their price targets on shares.

item.title: Moonshot AI accessed Nvidia's chips despite Chinese export ban, White House official says
item.description: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.

item.title: Comcast earnings highlight NBCUniversal strength ahead of planned split
item.description: Comcast said earlier this year it would split the cable businesses from the media business, creating two separate publicly traded companies.

item.title: Intel stock is down 27% from June record highs. How the chipmaker can reverse the slide
item.description: The report comes at a critical time for optimistic investors like us at the Club.

item.title: 4 credit card perks that help you manage debt
item.description: If you currently find yourself in the hole, you may view credit cards as your worst nightmare. But in some cases, they can actually help you get out of debt.

item.title: Analysis: Iran war energy shock hits the U.S. economy as gas and diesel prices climb
item.description: A new asymmetry in the market means fuel prices won't fall quickly even if the shooting in the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz stops.

item.title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano may have misled Congress, Democrats say
item.description: The IRS alone hemorrhaged more than 31,000 employees as of January in President Trump's government cuts, according to the agency's inspector general.

item.title: Google slapped with $1 billion fine under landmark EU digital law
item.description: European regulators fined Google 890 million euros ($1 billion) alleging the company gives preferential treatment to its own services.

item.title: China's Geely to make EVs at Ford plant in Spain under new joint venture
item.description: Ford and Geely plan for the joint venture will begin operations in the first half of 2027, with the first new vehicles scheduled to roll off the line in 2028.

item.title: Russia’s Amazon-style retail giant Wildberries is now in Ukraine’s crosshairs. Here's why
item.description: Ukraine has ratcheted up its attacks on Russia's Amazon-style retail giant Wildberries, signaling a new phase in the war.

item.title: UniCredit CEO tells CNBC acquisition of Commerzbank could happen in fourth quarter
item.description: UniCredit CEO Andrea Orcel told CNBC Thursday that the Italian bank could "potentially" acquire Commerzbank in the fourth quarter.

item.title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
item.description: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

item.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
item.description: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.
